name: MathJS_evaluate
description: Evaluate mathematical expressions using the MathJS API. Supports arithmetic, algebra, trigonometry, logarithms, constants (pi, e), unit conversions, and more. Returns the computed result as a string. Useful for scientific calculations, unit conversions, and mathematical computations that need server-side evaluation. No authentication required. Examples: '2*(7-3)', 'sqrt(16)+sin(pi/2)', '5 inches to cm', 'det([1,2;3,4])'.

expr.description: Mathematical expression to evaluate. Supports: arithmetic (+,-,*,/,^), functions (sqrt, sin, cos, tan, log, exp, abs, round, ceil, floor), constants (pi, e, i), matrices ([1,2;3,4]), units (5 inches to cm), complex numbers. URL-encode special characters if needed.

data.description: The computed result of the mathematical expression as a string
